instruction: 本文档的用途和适用对象是什么？
output: This document provides information on Cloud Native troubleshooting. It is intended for the administrators/operators for Cloud Native maintenance. It is also intended for the personnel who is responsible for clearing fault conditions and to restore the system to normal operation.

instruction: 文档中关于使用和版权的声明是什么？
output: This document is intended for use by Nokia's customers ("You"/"Your") in connection with a product purchased or licensed from any company within Nokia Group of Companies. Use this document as agreed. You agree to notify Nokia of any errors you may find in this document; however, should you elect to use this document for any purpose(s) for which it is not intended, You understand and warrant that any determinations You may make or actions You may take will be based upon Your independent judgment and analysis of the content of this document.

instruction: 如何登录到 HSS CN 的 docker 容器？
output: 1. Log in to the kubernetes control node. 2. To list the containers in a particular pod, execute: kubectl logs <pod-name> -n <namespace>. 3. To select the oam container, execute: kubectl exec -it <pod-name> -c <container-name> bash -n <namespace>. For example, kubectl exec -it cnnreg0526-dlb-1-b7498d955-qn5t7 -c oam bash -n nokia-imshss

instruction: 如何检查 Pod 状态以及如何判断 Pod 是否有问题？
output: Login to the Kubernetes control node and execute: kubectl get pod -n <namespace>. In the Ready column of the command output, if there is a mismatch in the number of containers (for example, it is 2/3 or 7/8 for a particular pod), it indicates that the Pod has issues. To check which container is not ready: kubectl get po <pod name> -o json -n <namespace> | jq -c ".status.containerStatuses[] | {Container: .name, Ready: .ready}"

instruction: Health check 时如何检查 Pod 注册状态？
output: 1. Login to etcd pod using: kubectl exec -it -n <namespace> <etcd podname> -- bash. 2. To check pod registration status from etcd: ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl get --prefix /udm/services/. If a pod's status is mentioned as "isReady:false", it indicates that the pod is not registered as load balanced endpoint. 3. From oam container execute: curl 127.0.0.1:17092/statusinfo to see key process status, application status, envoy status, Sdhelper status, etcd registration consistency, and Pod Terminating.

instruction: HSS CN 默认通过 ZTS 推送哪些日志路径？
output: From HSS CN, the following log files (with application path) are pushed into the ZTS LFS by default: /logstore/**/**/99/trace/**/*, /logstore/envoylogs/access.log, /logstore/entrypointlog/**/*, /logstore/proxy/*.log, /logstore/security/**/*, /logstore/supervisor/**/*, /logstore/**/ss7/log/*, /logstore/**/links/*, /logstore/dumplog/RtpDump.log. Additional paths apply to HLRCallP, SS7, hsscallp, hssfla, vnfclusterenvoylb, and CMA applications.

instruction: CnAdminTool 可以用来做什么？如何开启和停止 debug 跟踪？
output: Using CnAdminTool, operator can print service information, collect logs, start/stop process. To open the debug level trace: CnAdminTool TraceStart <Trace-Session-Name> <Trace-Filter> <List of Process-names|Process-name-start>. To stop: CnAdminTool TraceStop <Trace-Session-Name>. For example, CnAdminTool TraceStart reg_traces ALL_6 IMS_P_UMS to catch traces for all UMSTP processes; CnAdminTool TraceStop reg_traces to stop. The trace file is in directory /logstore/$hostname/oam/99/trace/reg_traces.

instruction: Pod housekeeping 的作用是什么？
output: Pod housekeeping aims to monitor disk space at pod level. It monitors the paths mentioned in the <podtype>AuditFile.ini file. If the storage space exceeds the specified threshold value, it raises alarms, such as warning, minor, major, or critical based on the threshold storage size. If the storage space exceeds the critical threshold value, the RtpAudRec process deletes the oldest files from the directory, and the storage space is retained to lower than the warning threshold value.

instruction: 重新部署前如何检查命名空间内资源是否已清理？
output: Execute the following commands to check if all the resources are cleaned up in a namespace: For NCP or non-Nokia CaaS OCP: oc get all -n <hsshlr-namespace>, oc get sa -n <hsshlr-namespace>, oc get role -n <hsshlr-namespace>, oc get rolebinding -n <hsshlr-namespace>, oc get job -n <hsshlr-namespace>. For NCS: ncs kubectl get all -n <hsshlr-namespace>, ncs kubectl get sa -n <hsshlr-namespace>, ncs kubectl get role -n <hsshlr-namespace>, ncs kubectl get rolebinding -n <hsshlr-namespace>, ncs kubectl get job -n <hsshlr-namespace>.

instruction: Cloud Native HSS 故障排查文档主要提供哪些方面的说明？
output: This document provides generic instructions to detect and troubleshoot the issues that arise with the Cloud Native (CN) system. It provides instructions to manage alarms, analyze fault symptoms, isolate faults, and take corrective actions to restore system operation to a fault-free condition. It covers logging in to docker container, checking Pod status, health check (pod status, alarms, netstat, process status, pod registration), log collection, log forwarding through ZTS, CnAdminTool, Pod housekeeping, cleaning resources before re-deployment, and failure scenarios (e.g. HSM failure, deployment failure, Telesys process failure, split brain on ss7 pods, Helm/image not onboarded, Pods not ready, and others).

instruction: 如何用 netstat 或 ss 检查连接状态？
output: Log in to docker container, then execute netstat -rn to view the routing table (or ip route for IPv4). Execute netstat –an|grep <port number> to show connectivity status for the protocol. For IPv6 deployment it is recommended to use ss command: ss -na |grep <port number> to show connectivity status for the IPv6 protocol.

instruction: 如何查看节点上 dead 进程及健康节点的要求？
output: Log in to docker container. To view names of dead processes execute: status1 –e. To view the number of dead processes: status1 -e|wc -l. For a healthy, up and running node, the number of dead processes need to be zero. To view all process names on a node: status1.

instruction: HSM 故障时如何收集诊断信息？
output: Login to oam container of arpf pod using kubectl exec. Execute: 1. cd /tcnVol/arpf 2. perl csdiag.pl. The script executes diagnostics commands on CSLAN of the HSM boxes (IP address) which are configured on HsmServers table configuration in ARPF service and provides the outputs result on the console.

instruction: Telesys 进程故障时如何排查？
output: 1. Verify key file availability on the node. If the key file is unavailable, check whether the key is uploaded to FileStore appropriately in path: /logstore/FileStore/<key file>. 2. Check entrypoint logs in path: /logstore/entrypointlog/ss7/entrypoint.log.

instruction: SS7 pod 发生 split brain 时如何恢复？
output: When ss7 pods have no cross-box connectivity with each other (split brain), to recover the system follow the procedure mentioned in the SCTP system parameter tuning for ss7 pod section in the Nokia HSS CN Deployment guide. The Telesys stack must be restarted on both the ss7 pods, and this tuning ensures that the system recovers from split brain with minimal CFR.

instruction: Pods 未就绪时如何排查？
output: 1. Rollback the failed NS instance manually: helm3 rollback -n NAMESPACE RELEASE [--no-hooks]. 2. Perform the NS instance update procedural step mentioned in the HSS CNF upgrade using NCOM section of Nokia HSS CN Deployment using NCOM document. If the same NS package and NS input is used, make a dummy change in the NS input (e.g. add a new value) so NCOM updates.

instruction: 如何删除 ZTS cmserver？
output: On the cmcontroller pod execute cmcli getctrlinfo to obtain controller pod information. To delete ZTS cmserver: a) Login to cmserver pod: Kubectl exec -it <cmserver pod> bash. b) Delete configuration data: cmcli DeleteVNF <vnfid> (e.g. cmcli DeleteVNF hsslcm). The DeleteVNF command needs cmadmins group user credentials. It removes VNF data from the pod but the pod is not deleted; the pod is marked as free for new VNF addition.

instruction: DLB 或 SS7 Pod 卡在 terminating 状态且节点崩溃时如何恢复？
output: When NCS edge node or OCP worker node is crashed or powered off and DLB/SS7 Pods are stuck in terminating state: if failure is temporary, Pods recover automatically after node recovery. If the node cannot recover and node removal from API server is not possible, the operator must execute: kubectl delete pod -n <namespace> --force to forcefully delete the terminating DLB or SS7 Pods.

instruction: Helm release 卡在 pending 状态的可能原因和解决方法？
output: Possible cause: The Helm chart nreg-hss-hlr is stuck when global.lcm.ztshooklcmpasswdsecret.enabled is set to true but the secret ztshooklcmpasswdsecret is deleted or tampered during upgrade or rollback. Solution: Restore the secrets and execute: ncs helm3 rollback <HELM-RELEASE-NAME> <REVISION> <NAMESPACE>. For example: ncs helm3 rollback blrsyve1-nreg-hss-hlr 4 -n nokia-imshss.

instruction: AuC Re-encryption 与 One-NDS 通信失败且出现 ECDHE_RSA 不支持时如何处理？
output: If SPML request with AuC Re-encryption fails and Unsupported authentication type: ECDHE_RSA is found in One-NDS PGW logs, perform steps in TS-ONENDS-SW-0181 AuC Re-encryption Support on One-NDS 22.2. If all HSS/HLR versions are >=23.8, change PGW parameter to <property name="reEncryptionAuthType" value="ECDHE_RSA">. If mixed versions, operator may need to set reEncryptionAuthType to RSA and modify FE configuration SSL_CIPHER_LIST for version >=23.8 as per the document.

instruction: Pstack 命令在哪些容器中支持？如何使用？
output: In NCS 22, OAM and Application containers (arpf, trigger, hsscallp, hlrcallp, dlb and hssli) support Pstack command. Example: In arpf container of arpf pod, log in to arpf container, get PID (e.g. ps -ef |grep -i acu) and execute pstack <PID> to obtain stack trace for the process.
